business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management — warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio. Years in business: 31. Years with current management: 22. Number of employees: 95 full-time and 18 part-time. Annual revenue / gross receipts: $48,000,000. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Written contracts with all subcontractors: No. Occupancy regularly occupied vs. vacant: 90%. Building fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R: No. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring: Yes. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors: Yes. Material Safety Data Sheets maintained: No. Lockout/tagout procedures in place: No.

concerns: Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R.

Operations include warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities.
